_schema: Per-segment seed lists. Each segment has: seeds (known competitor page_ids), search_terms (for discovering NEW competitors by brand name), deny_domains (filter false-positive matches whose ad copy contains search terms but who aren't real competitors).
_how_to_add: Copy one of the example segments below, rename it to your niche, and replace the data with your real competitors. Find Facebook Page IDs at facebook.com/ads/library (search the brand, open advertiser profile, copy the view_all_page_id from the URL).

weight-loss-demo.description: EXAMPLE SEGMENT — Weight loss programs, coaches, and telehealth offers. Public-brand seeds for illustration. Replace with your own niche.

seeds.notes: Mega advertiser, psychology-based weight loss app

ai-coaching-demo.description: EXAMPLE SEGMENT — AI coaching / cohort / accelerator programs. Replace with your own real seeds and search terms.
